zh.Newcastle-Upon-Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Harding於大約1365年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾坎布利其時，他的父親Adam de Harding17歲，母親Lucia21歲。他於1390年與Lucia de Cam在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1410年在英國格盧斯特斯爾坎布利其享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Harding于大约1365年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾坎布利其时，他的父亲Adam de Harding17岁，母亲Lucia21岁。他于1390年与Lucia de Cam在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1410年在英国格盧斯特斯爾坎布利其享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Harding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Harding (Old English Hearding, literally ‘the hard one’ a derivative of Old English heard ‘hard, harsh, strong, firm, brave’). The surname was first taken to Ireland in the 15th century, and more families of the name settled there 200 years later in Tipperary and surrounding counties.

North German and Dutch: patronymic from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names beginning with hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, or a habitational name from a farm named Harding, of the same etymology.

History: Warren Gamaliel Harding (1865–1923), the 29th president of the US, was born on a farm in OH, of English and Scottish stock on his father's side. Early American bearers of this very common name include Joseph Harding who died at Plymouth in 1633. His great-great grandson Seth was a naval officer during the American Revolution.

variants.name: Hardin
meanings: French: from a pet form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names composed of the element hard ‘hard, strong’. This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Arduino
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Jose, Luis, Marina, Alberto, Alfonso, Alturo, Angel, Arturo, Azucena, Basilio, Carlos.  Italian Antonio, Gabino.
Italian and Hispanic: from the personal name Arduino, which is of ancient Germanic origin, akin to Harding 2.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Harding was born about 1365, in Cambridge, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Adam de Harding, was 17 and his mother, Lucia, was 21. He married Lucia de Cam in 1390, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1410, in Cambridge, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 46.

Il a épousé Lucia de Cam en 1390, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1410, à Cambridge, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ko.Newcastle-Upon-Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Harding(이)가 대략 1365년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Harding(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucia(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 Lucia de Cam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1410년 영국 그루스스터실르 캄브리지에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Harding родился около 1365 г. в местности камбридж, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Adam de Harding было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucia, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucia de Cam в 1390 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1410 г. в местности камбридж, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет.
